privileged_info_summary: The task configures a Jenkins freestyle job named 'legacy-system-build' to use a custom workspace at /tmp/legacy_ws. The expected log pattern 'Building in workspace /tmp/legacy_ws' is a standard Jenkins message logged to console output when builds execute in custom workspaces. The task setup clones from the public repository https://github.com/jenkins-docs/simple-java-maven-app.git.
